block_00: Here is why Financial Health matters
block_01: Some people may think that absence of debt is the cornerstone of good financial health. Though being debt-free is important, there are also other factors to keep in mind. Health insurance, savings and a reasonable budget may play a big role as well.
block_02: There are a few important questions to consider when assessing your financial health. What is your net worth? Do you keep track of your expenses? Have you thought about retirement savings? Answers to these questions might help you evaluate your current financial condition and make the necessary changes.
block_03: This article offers a method of assessing your financial state and 3 simple steps to improve it. Take a look to determine your financial health and learn how to fix it.
